title: HOME OWNERSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: COOS COUNTY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY HOME OWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Habitat for Humanity provides an opportunity for families to build and buy their own homes. The houses are sold at no profit to homeowner families, who provide sweat equity labor to help build the houses. 760 S 2nd Street Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Family currently living in substandard housing who: 1) meet income guidelines 2) can commit to 500 hours of sweat equity in construction 3) is a United States citizen or permanent legal resident 4) Have not owned a home in the past 3 years 5) has ability to pay a mortgage payment (steady income and decent credit history) Hours: Monday/Friday by appointment only, Tuesday-Thursday 10am-4pm Email (541) 756-1600 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers ReStore Site (541) 756-1600 Administration (541) 756-9080 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Households are responsible for a closing fee of up to $4,000. 0% down payment for closing costs and a 0%-interest mortgage (0% APR). Mortgage lengths vary depending on income; Habitat adjusts the length of the mortgage so that the monthly mortgage payment (which includes taxes, insurance, and condo fees, if applicable) is no more than 30% of the homeowner’s gross monthly income at the time of sale. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Coos County Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Subsidized Home Acquisition Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME REPAIR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COOS COUNTY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY
